excerpts.title: Primitives in Qiskit 0.45
excerpts.content: Qiskit 0.45 exposes reference primitives like Sampler and Estimator from qiskit.primitives. Examples commonly call sampler.run(circuits).result() and estimator.run(circuits, observables, parameter_values).

excerpts.title: Fake backends and transpile
excerpts.content: Qiskit 0.45 examples often import FakeManila or related fake backends from qiskit.providers.fake_provider. Transpilation examples combine transpile(circuit, backend=backend, optimization_level=2).

excerpts.title: OpenQASM helpers
excerpts.content: Qiskit 0.45 includes qasm2.dumps and qasm2.loads helpers for OpenQASM 2 round-trips. This is the recommended offline-friendly string export path in the sample corpus.

excerpts.title: Preset pass manager utilities
excerpts.content: Preset pass managers can be created with generate_preset_pass_manager(optimization_level=1, backend=backend) and then used to run a circuit.
